analysis_plan_ref.anchor: SS5 (instrument; ONE primary contrast T = pooled mean of WINSORIZED (+-2.0 nats/tok) d_i = NLL(s4-bldf-d) - NLL(s4-semd); FAMILY-CLUSTER seeded bootstrap over the PINNED 30 template families, B=10,000 seed 20260806; VALIDATE-track lb > 0 AND T >= 0.05; KILL-1 upper95 < 0.05 (ASM-2399); TOST +-0.05 on the 90% CI; honest cluster power se ~ 0.025, joint MDE_80 ~ 0.071, SESOI split ~0.05/0.50/0.45; SS5.3 full-verdict power) + SS6 (instrument gates -> INSTRUMENT-INVALID; liveness (incl. the registered 1e-3 stdev floor)/family/pins-present/live-ledger (registered phase-boundary checkpoint sequence) mechanical gates; realized removed-dose matching on the common-token replay within 5% of the dose GATED on per-prompt trajectory-digest identity, projected matching RECOMPUTED from the audit fields; void budget 1; SS6.1 construction-phase pre-spend verdict point + final-phase band/coherence refusals) + SS7 (kill triggers verbatim, tier-scoped dose, pre-spend dose-band stop) + SS10 (skeptic-4 attack record) + SS11 (cross-model pre-run review HOLD -> R2 fix dispositions) + SS12 (skeptic-5 R2 re-attack: 7 findings dispositioned - kill-1 dose floor, io_match power, coherence refusals, corpus-bound rows) + SS13 (stage-4 cross-model RE-REVIEW of R2: 3 residual spurious-verdict paths -> R3 dispositions - trajectory-digest io_match + projected-match recompute, n_target_toks + liveness floor, final-phase dose band/coherence + registered checkpoint sequence + corrected TOST/kill prose)

arms_mandatory_baselines: s4-b0: unmasked pinned-config baseline (quality + throughput + replay reference)

s4-bldf-d: the PRIMARY blind comparator - deployable concept-free frequency heuristic (ascending T-build selection count, EXPERT_BUDGET-analog per colibri #254's heuristic family), greedily matched to s4-semd's projected removed I/O within +-2% (ASM-2387); beating chance validates nothing deployable, so the composite pipeline must beat THIS. EVIDENCE ASYMMETRY IS PART OF THE CLAIM (ASM-2397): the composite consumes ~2 orders of magnitude more routing evidence than this arm's 3,072-token telemetry; the contrast is composite-pipeline-vs-deployable-heuristic, never 'causal vs frequency at matched evidence'.

s4-bldr-d-r1..r3: secondary random blind - seeded cost-proportional draws matched to the same removed I/O (seeds 20260803/20260804/20260805) - separates selection-matters from everything-is-safe-at-this-dose; r2/r3 are the ONLY ladder-droppable arms (disclosed in meta.degradation.dropped_arms; primary completeness is pair-only so drops cannot touch it).

MATCHED-I/O INVARIANT (ASM-2385/2386/2396/2398): every dose-D blind arm matches s4-semd's PROJECTED removed miss-bytes/token within 2% at construction (builder fills a +-1% window; zero-cost cells barred from every fill; identical blind/semd cell sets refused fail-closed) AND the REALIZED removed dose - measured on the COMMON-TOKEN REPLAY of the pinned s4-b0 reference trajectories, (replay-missbytes/tok(s4-b0) - replay-missbytes/tok(arm)) / replay-missbytes/tok(s4-b0) - must match s4-semd's within 5% OF THE DOSE for s4-bldf-d; violation VOIDs (io_match_valid), never reinterpreted; matching is on measured I/O mass, never cell count or nominal cap; free-running decode miss-bytes are descriptive only (divergent generated tokens can no longer contaminate the gated quantity).

dependent_vars.definition: Quality endpoint carrier: teacher-forced mean NLL per target token on the pinned 300-item suite, ONE prefill per (item x quality arm) - the stage-3-validated final-logit readout (ASM-2390). ALL licensed claims ride the paired PRIMARY contrast d_i = NLL_i(s4-bldf-d) - NLL_i(s4-semd); no correctness/accuracy claim is licensed anywhere in this record.
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: Host parameters UNCHANGED by construction: drop/remap select among native experts; nothing is trained or written.
dependent_vars.name: params

dependent_vars.definition: Per-arm mask table files (canonical serialization, whole-file sha256); NO shard-size or page-cache-pool claim attaches.
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: 2,400 quality prefills (300 x 8 arms) + T-build telemetry decode (16x192 tokens) + T-eval decode (4 arms x 2 passes x 8x96 tokens) + COMMON-TOKEN replay (4 arms x 8x96 forced tokens over the pinned s4-b0 reference trajectories). Realized per-arm tok/s (free-running) and replay expert miss-bytes/token are the systems endpoints; tok/s(s4-semd) > tok/s(s4-b0) is a PASS component, its magnitude is descriptive.
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute
dependent_vars.unit: prefills + decode tokens + forced replay tokens + miss-bytes/token

dependent_vars.definition: Identically ZERO by construction: masks are built offline (CPU, pure function); no gradients anywhere.
dependent_vars.name: training_compute

n_planned.assumption_ids: ASM-2384..2396 (designer-15, registry/assumptions.jsonl, 2026-07-16; 2395/2396 skeptic-4 fix wave) + ASM-2397..2400 (designer-18, 2026-07-16, cross-model pre-run review fix wave: estimand option (b), replay/liveness/family/completeness/pins gates, revised kill boundary + full-verdict power, 76-layer universe + construction-phase kill + live ledger) + ASM-2383 (stage-3 scope guard) + ASM-2342 (76 MoE layers, MEASURED) + ASM-2401..2403 (designer-19, 2026-07-16, stage-4 re-review R3 fix wave: trajectory-digest io_match + projected-match recompute; n_target_toks required + liveness meaningful-variance floor; final-phase dose band/coherence refusals + registered phase-boundary checkpoint sequence + corrected TOST/kill prose) - all centrally registered, all resolved except ASM-2389, formally SUPERSEDED by ASM-2399 (re-review item 5c)
n_planned.budget_note: usd_cap = 40 AND wall_clock_cap_hours = 36, WHICHEVER BINDS FIRST (inside the bead's 25-40 ceiling; ASM-2393), enforced LIVE (ASM-2400): the runner appends a monotone cost checkpoint at every registered phase boundary and ABORTS (salvage-stop) the moment accrued realized spend reaches a cap; the pinned analysis re-checks the checkpoint trail mechanically against the REGISTERED phase-boundary label sequence (telemetry, masks, bring-up, quality-<arm> x8, t-eval, replay; distinct labels in registered order; absence lawful only for a lawfully dropped ladder arm; duplicate/placeholder trails rejected - ASM-2403). Planning point ~ USD 18 / 16 h on the MEASURED stage-3 basis ~USD 1.15/h, ~11.0 s/prefill (ASM-2392): telemetry 2-8, quality 2,400 prefills 8.4-12.3, throughput 4 arms x 2 passes x 768 decode tokens 4-16 pessimistic, common-token replay 4 arms x 768 forced tokens 1-4, staging ~1.4. Decode s/token UNKNOWN until telemetry (band 2-10 s/tok stipulated); post-telemetry projection over the cap triggers the pre-registered degradation ladder: (1) T-build 192->128 tokens/prompt, (2) T-eval 96->64, (3) drop s4-bldr-d-r2/r3 (ANALYSIS-COMPATIBLE: primary completeness is pair-only, so random-arm drops cannot zero the primary complete cases), (4) STOP and return to the coordinator; the 300-item suite, s4-b0/s4-semd/s4-bldf-d, s4-sem16, and the replay pass are never cut.
n_planned.coverage_gates_pre_spend: ALL fail to the coordinator BEFORE quality/throughput spend: telemetry < 2,000 decode tokens; masks fail to re-derive byte-identical; any blind arm outside the 2% projected matching window; bring-up inertness or pin gate failure; post-telemetry cost projection above caps after the full degradation ladder; PRE-SPEND DOSE VERDICT POINT (ASM-2396/2400): the pinned analysis accepts a phase='construction' meta-only stream computed from telemetry+masks alone - an achievable dose capped below 2% FIRES KILL TRIGGER 2 at a ~USD 2-8 ledger, a projected dose in [2%, 8%) is a PRE-SPEND STOP (telemetry + masks return as data; no spend on a verdict fixed in advance), and a projected dose >= 8% REFUSES to emit any verdict (the campaign proceeds).
n_planned.n_suite_items: n = 300 pinned suite items EXACTLY (data/glm-s4drop-quality-suite-v1, 10 domains x 3 families x 10; the id->family mapping is PINNED in the analysis, ASM-2398); completeness gate: ZERO missing primary-pair rows (s4-semd, s4-bldf-d) and <= 5 arm-incomplete per secondary arm else VOID; no sampling step
n_planned.n_tbuild: 16 pinned T-build prompts x 192 new tokens (telemetry only, no quality scoring)
n_planned.n_teval_prompts: 8 pinned T-eval prompts x 96 new tokens per throughput arm (4 arms) x 2 seeded interleaved passes (free-running) + 1 common-token replay per (arm x prompt) over the pinned s4-b0 reference trajectories (ASM-2398)
n_planned.power: Honest CLUSTER power (ASM-2396/2399): planning within-family sigma 0.30 / between-family tau 0.10 (both STIPULATED) => se(T) ~ 0.025 at 30 families x 10 items; joint VALIDATE MDE_80 ~ 0.071 nats/tok. Verdict split under the R2 decision rule (kill = upper95 < SESOI, ASM-2399): at true +0.10 validate ~ 0.977 / kill ~ 1e-4; at the +0.05 SESOI kill ~ 0.05 / validate ~ 0.50 / inconclusive ~ 0.45 (no spurious kill of a true-SESOI effect; the R1 lb<=0 rule killed it at ~0.366 and is RETIRED); at true 0 kill ~ 0.64 / validate ~ 0.02 / inconclusive ~ 0.34. FULL-VERDICT power (ASM-2399, skeptic-5-revised): realized-dose clause P ~ 0.9999 at projected 9.8% (stipulated per-arm transfer sigma_rel 0.05 on the replay currency); io_match 5%-of-dose gate P ~ 0.975 under stipulated between-arm error correlation rho 0.9 (common forced trajectory; sensitivity: rho 0.5 => P ~ 0.68, and an io_match miss is a VOID, never a verdict); two-pass tok/s clause P ~ 0.99 at true gain +8% (stipulated per-pass se 0.02); design-point full-verdict validate ~ 0.94, ~ 0.66 at true gain +4% (tok/s is the disclosed weakest link; a tok/s miss is INCONCLUSIVE, never a kill). KILL trigger 1 carries the SAME realized-dose floor as PASS (>= 8%, skeptic-5 finding 1): a quality tie at a sub-floor dose is INCONCLUSIVE, never a kill. Every non-demonstration is scoped to this resolution, never read as 'no effect'; the honest power lever is more template families, not more items per family.
n_planned.seed_registry: 20260801 suite-generator date-tag (string seed glm-s4drop-0:quality-suite-v1:20260801); 20260802 arm-order block randomization; 20260803/4/5 random-blind realizations; 20260806 bootstrap DRBG
n_planned.statistics: Primary T = pooled mean over the 300 primary-pair-complete suite items of the WINSORIZED (+-2.0 nats/tok; raw mean + winsorized count disclosed) delta d_i = NLL_i(s4-bldf-d) - NLL_i(s4-semd); FAMILY-CLUSTER seeded SHA-256-DRBG percentile bootstrap over the PINNED 30 template families (items are near-clones within a family; B = 10,000, seed 20260806). Decisions: VALIDATE-track iff one-sided 95% lower bound (5th pct) > 0 AND T >= +0.05; KILL trigger 1 iff one-sided 95% UPPER bound (95th pct) < +0.05 AND realized (replay) dose >= 0.08 (ASM-2399 + skeptic-5 finding 1 - the data must AFFIRM no-effect-at-SESOI at lever-scale dose; lb <= 0 alone is INCONCLUSIVE, and a tie at a sub-floor dose is INCONCLUSIVE); TOST margin +-0.05 on the 90% CI (a TOST pass implies upper bound < +0.05 but NOT the kill by itself: the kill is 8%-realized-dose-floored while TOST is dose-independent, so at a sub-floor dose TOST is reported alongside INCONCLUSIVE - ASM-2403); every quality secondary uses the same winsorized clustered machinery on its own pairwise-complete set. All constants pinned in analysis/glm_s4drop_stdin.py (ASM-2396/2398/2399/2401/2402/2403; ASM-2389 superseded by ASM-2399). No optional stopping; no post-hoc subgroups.

endpoints.test: EXACTLY ONE primary (SS5.2): paired per-item quality at matched removed expert-miss-I/O - T = pooled mean of WINSORIZED (+-2.0 nats/tok) d_i = NLL_i(s4-bldf-d) - NLL_i(s4-semd) over the 300 primary-pair-complete suite items (positive = composite better; raw mean at /analysis/primary_delta_raw_nats, winsorized count at /analysis/n_winsorized; ESTIMAND per ASM-2397: composite-pipeline-vs-deployable-frequency-heuristic, NOT a causal-evidence isolate); FAMILY-CLUSTER seeded percentile bootstrap over the PINNED 30 families (B=10,000, seed 20260806). VALIDATE-track iff the one-sided 95% lower bound (/analysis/primary_lb95) > 0 AND T >= +0.05 (/analysis/primary_joint_pass); KILL trigger 1 iff the one-sided 95% upper bound (/analysis/primary_ub95) < +0.05 AND the realized replay dose (/analysis/dose_achieved_realized) >= 0.08 (ASM-2399 + skeptic-5 finding 1); lb <= 0 with upper bound >= +0.05 is INCONCLUSIVE, never a kill, and a quality tie at a sub-floor dose is INCONCLUSIVE; all with io_match_valid, family_valid, quality_liveness_valid and every other gate TRUE (else INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never reinterpreted). TOST: 90% CI inside +-0.05 (/analysis/tost_equiv_at_margin) licenses exactly 'no composite-mask selective advantage at the 0.05 nats/tok resolution on this suite at this telemetry budget' - never bare equivalence. The record VERDICT PASS additionally requires REALIZED common-token-replay dose >= 0.08 (/analysis/dose_achieved_realized) AND the two-pass tok/s clause (/analysis/pass_gate). A non-demonstration is scoped 'not demonstrated at joint MDE_80 ~ 0.071 nats/tok, 30 families x 10 items, this suite, this box' - NEVER 'no effect'.

H-J: one-sided 95% upper bound of mean NLL(s4-sem16) - NLL(s4-b0) on the pairwise-complete set (size at /analysis/secondary_n_items); < 0.05 nats/tok => the 16-cell skiplist is jointly quality-safe at the registered margin (/analysis/joint16_noninferior) - closes the ASM-2383 simultaneity gap in THIS direction only; a miss is reported, never silently absorbed into the primary.

Projected achieved fraction (/analysis/dose_achieved_frac) vs the 0.10 target plus the REALIZED removed dose on the common-token replay (/analysis/dose_achieved_realized); dose_capped discloses tier exhaustion; a construction cap < 0.02 FIRES KILL TRIGGER 2 - issuable at the PRE-SPEND point via the phase='construction' analysis mode (/analysis/construction_stop, ASM-2400); [0.02, 0.08) at construction is a PRE-SPEND STOP, and the band binds FINAL streams too: an in-band projected dose or a realized replay dose incoherent with the projection (> 1.15x, or < 0.02 at a lawful projection) is REFUSED fail-closed, never graded (ERR_S4A_DOSE_BAND / ERR_S4A_DOSE_INCOHERENT, ASM-2403); realized >= 0.08 is a PASS component (ASM-2386/2396/2398; fractions are tier-scoped, /analysis/telemetry_tier).

Realized decode tok/s per arm on free-running T-eval from the engine counters, TWO seeded interleaved passes per arm (/analysis/tokps, /analysis/tokps_gain_by_pass); the PASS clause is pooled s4-semd-vs-s4-b0 gain >= +3% AND a positive gain in each pass (ASM-2396); magnitudes are DESCRIPTIVE - no cross-hardware or deployment tok/s claim attaches.

Per-item mean over the PRESENT random-blind realizations minus s4-semd (seeded, cost-proportional, matched I/O; /analysis/randblind_n_realizations disclosed - r2/r3 may be ladder-dropped): separates 'selection matters' from 'everything is safe at this dose'; descriptive CI, no licensing role.

s4-remap16 minus s4-sem16 (CACHE_ROUTE-analog substitution vs drop-only on the same 16 cells; 9 swap_to targets from stage-3), pairwise-complete set: descriptive; drop and remap are never confounded in one arm.

Greedy-decode token match-rate vs s4-b0 on free-running T-eval per arm: DESCRIPTIVE ONLY (greedy divergence is chaotic; ASM-2390); the GATED decode-side quantity is the common-token replay dose (/analysis/replay_missbytes_per_tok, ASM-2398); teacher-forced NLL remains the licensed quality instrument.

The registered resolution statement carried into every readout (/analysis/power_scope + /analysis/full_verdict_power, ASM-2399): cluster se(T) ~ 0.025, joint VALIDATE MDE_80 ~ 0.071 nats/tok at 30 pinned families under STIPULATED sigma/tau 0.30/0.10; verdict split at 0 / +0.05 / +0.10 disclosed; full-verdict power carries stipulated noise models for the dose and tok/s clauses; the stale R1 iid figure (MDE ~ 0.043) is RETIRED and its carrier ASM-2389 formally SUPERSEDED by ASM-2399 (re-review item 5c); every non-demonstration carries this scope; the honest power lever is a bigger suite, not more bootstrap replicates.

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Results bind ONLY to: GLM-5.2 served as the pinned community int4/int8-MTP estate (weights content-hash pinned at bring-up) by the colibri C engine at base commit a78a06fc5acc4b0dc0f9ef03987c66b0559d1250 with the two committed stage-3 patches and the ops-amended S4_TABLE patch, on the single pinned Modal OCI 4-core/64GiB RAM_GB=55 configuration; DRAFT=0 greedy decoding with EXPERT_BUDGET and CACHE_ROUTE OFF; the pinned 300-item template quality suite and the pinned 24-prompt decode corpus (T-build/T-eval, plus the in-run-pinned s4-b0 reference trajectories for the common-token replay); masks built by the pinned pure function over the 76-MoE-layer universe (3..78, ASM-2342) from THIS telemetry at the registered 10% dose; the registered cost-model tier (M or disclosed P). ESTIMAND (ASM-2397): a PASS licenses only 'the Stage-4 COMPOSITE mask (causal core + UNVALIDATED atlas extension) beat the registered matched-I/O ascending-frequency blind baseline AT THIS TELEMETRY BUDGET, at this dose, on this estate' and a narrow method post - the contrast does NOT isolate causal evidence per se (the composite consumes ~2 orders of magnitude more routing evidence than the blind arm's 3,072-token telemetry; the atlas extension supplies almost all of the dose) and NO sentence of the form 'causal evidence improves expert ranking' is licensed by ANY outcome. Quality claims are teacher-forced mean-NLL claims on this suite ONLY - decode-loop drift is covered solely by the descriptive match-rate secondary and NO autoregressive-quality claim attaches; NO MTP/DRAFT-acceptance claim attaches (all arms DRAFT=0); tok/s and miss-bytes/token bind to this box and workload - NOTHING here supports cross-hardware, batch-serving, latency, shard-size, page-cache, or deployment claims; NO model-wide droppable-fraction rate may be stated (ASM-2383: enriched non-random selection); NO deterministic-replacement claim attaches (stage-3: zero DETERMINISTIC-REPLACEABLE cells); NO equivalence sentence beyond the registered TOST wording; dose fractions are defined w.r.t. the registered telemetry tier's cost measure (tier disclosed in /analysis/telemetry_tier); no outcome moves the programme's EFFICIENCY or CORRECTNESS synthesis verdicts; nothing extends to other models, engines, quantizations, boxes, doses, or workloads, and no intelligence, parity, or general-capability sentence of any kind is licensed.
hypotheses: H-P (PRIMARY, falsifiable): at matched removed expert-miss-I/O per token (matching GATED on the common-token replay currency within 5% of the dose), the COMPOSITE mask s4-semd (causal core + UNVALIDATED atlas extension, ASM-2397) beats the frequency-heuristic blind mask s4-bldf-d on paired per-item teacher-forced quality by >= +0.05 nats/target-token (one-sided 95% bootstrap lower bound > 0 AND T >= +0.05). PRE-NAMED NULL (stated, not asserted): on a cache-constrained box the miss tail IS the rare tail, so the two masks largely coincide in effect and the contrast ties - the composite pipeline adds nothing deployable over colibri's concept-free heuristics. Under the R2 decision rule this null KILLS when AFFIRMED (one-sided 95% upper bound < +0.05) and resolves INCONCLUSIVE when merely unresolved (lb <= 0 with upper bound >= +0.05 is never a kill; ASM-2399).

H-J (joint safety, secondary): dropping all 16 stage-3 skiplist cells SIMULTANEOUSLY costs < 0.05 nats/tok vs s4-b0 (one-sided 95% upper bound) - the ASM-2383 simultaneity gap tested directly; individual-ablation safety does NOT imply this.

H-R (remap, secondary/descriptive): swapping the 9 swap_to cells (CACHE_ROUTE-analog substitution) instead of dropping them does not degrade quality vs drop-only s4-sem16; drop and remap are never confounded in one arm.

H-D (dose feasibility): a composite mask reaching >= 10% of measured decode expert-miss-I/O exists within causal + atlas-rare-tail coverage; an achievable dose capped below 2% kills the direction as physically negligible (kill trigger 2 - issuable at the PRE-SPEND point from telemetry+masks alone via the pinned analysis phase='construction' mode, ASM-2400).
kill_criterion_verbatim: GLM-S4DROP-0 is KILLED (verdict FAIL, expert-drop is NOT validated as a real throughput lever for this programme) iff, with every instrument gate TRUE (pins, pins-present, telemetry, disjointness, mask construction, FAMILY, QUALITY-LIVENESS, io-match, decode-config, inertness, completeness, seeds, cost-ledger), EITHER (1) the primary one-sided 95% cluster-bootstrap UPPER confidence bound on T = pooled mean winsorized [NLL(s4-bldf-d) - NLL(s4-semd)] is < +0.05 AT a realized common-token-replay dose >= 8% (/analysis/kill_fired, reason 'upper bound'; a tie observed at a sub-floor dose is INCONCLUSIVE - the lever question was not asked at lever scale, skeptic-5 finding 1): the data AFFIRM that the composite mask has no selective advantage as large as the registered SESOI over the frequency-blind mask matched on actual removed I/O (common-token replay currency), so expert-drop is not a SELECTIVE lever at this telemetry budget - the composite pipeline adds nothing deployable beyond the registered concept-free frequency heuristic and the direction stops pending redesign; OR (2) the achievable composite dose is capped at construction below 2% of measured decode expert-miss-bytes/token under the registered telemetry tier (/analysis/kill_fired, reason 'dose-capped'; issuable at the PRE-SPEND point from telemetry+masks alone via the phase='construction' analysis mode, ASM-2400; an UNCAPPED sub-2% dose is incoherent input and is REFUSED fail-closed, ERR_S4A_DOSE_INCOHERENT): even with the full causal skiplist plus the entire atlas-rare tail, expert-drop cannot remove enough I/O to be a throughput lever on this estate. VALIDATE (verdict PASS) = primary joint pass (lb > 0 AND T >= +0.05) AND REALIZED common-token-replay dose >= 8% AND the two-pass tok/s clause (pooled >= +3%, positive each pass): a clear positive lower bound at a physically meaningful, physically realized dose - unlocks ONLY a narrow composite-pruning method post (ESTIMAND per ASM-2397: no 'causal evidence beats frequency' sentence is licensed); #207 stays PAUSED and deterministic replacement stays unevidenced (stage-3: zero DETERMINISTIC-REPLACEABLE cells). INCONCLUSIVE: everything else - EXPLICITLY INCLUDING lb <= 0 with upper bound >= +0.05 (the underpowered region is reported at its resolution, NEVER killed; ASM-2399) and an lb > 0 with T < +0.05 (selective signal below the registered SESOI). PRE-SPEND STOP (neither kill nor pass): a projected achievable dose in [2%, 8%) stops the campaign at the masks - PASS would be unreachable and kill-2 unfireable, so nothing is spent on a verdict fixed in advance. The band binds BOTH phases (ASM-2403): a FINAL stream whose projected dose lies inside [2%, 8%) bypassed the registered stop and is REFUSED fail-closed (ERR_S4A_DOSE_BAND), and a realized common-token-replay dose that exceeds the projection by more than the registered 15% coherence tolerance (3x the stipulated transfer sigma_rel 0.05, ASM-2399) or collapses below 2% at a lawful projection is REFUSED fail-closed (ERR_S4A_DOSE_INCOHERENT) - never graded. NOT KILLS: any instrument-gate failure (INSTRUMENT-INVALID - the question was not cleanly asked; an all-equal/inert/rounded/near-zero-variance NLL readout (below the registered 1e-3 nats/tok stdev floor, ASM-2402) is a LIVENESS void, never a tie-kill; io_match/family/inertness/pins/completeness/telemetry/seeds/decode-config/cost-ledger violations are VOIDS, never reinterpreted; VOID BUDGET 1: an INSTRUMENT-INVALID readout obligates a coordinator rerun decision and a second VOID escalates to the maintainer - VOID is never a quiet exit from an impending kill). TOST note: 90% CI inside +-0.05 licenses exactly the sentence 'no composite-mask selective advantage at the 0.05 nats/tok resolution on this suite at this telemetry budget'; a TOST pass implies upper bound < +0.05, but TOST is DOSE-INDEPENDENT while kill trigger (1) carries the 8% realized-dose floor - so a TOST pass coincides with the kill ONLY at lever-scale realized dose, and at a sub-floor realized dose a TOST equivalence is reported alongside an INCONCLUSIVE verdict, never a kill (re-review item 5, ASM-2403; selftest branch tost-lowdose). A kill or a non-demonstration is a REAL RESULT filed at equal structural prominence, always carrying its resolution scope (joint VALIDATE MDE_80 ~ 0.071 nats/tok at 30 pinned families under the STIPULATED planning sigma/tau 0.30/0.10; verdict split at the SESOI ~ 0.05 kill / 0.50 validate / 0.45 inconclusive per ASM-2399).

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py
corpus_hashes.glm-s4drop-masks-v1: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:the 7 mask tables + masks_manifest.json - PURE FUNCTION of (telemetry, stage3-inputs corpus, registered constants/seeds) via the pinned builder; whole-file sha256s enter the ops amendment; re-derived byte-identical at bring-up or halt (ASM-2388)
corpus_hashes.glm-s4drop-telemetry-v1: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:kot-s4tel/1 T-build decode telemetry (per-cell selection + cache-miss bytes, tier M or disclosed tier P) - produced by the runner's telemetry phase on the pinned box, pinned by ops amendment BEFORE any quality/throughput spend (ASM-2385)

pins.harness_manifest: S4_TABLE decode-mask patch (ASM-2394) vs pinned colibri base a78a06fc5acc4b0dc0f9ef03987c66b0559d1250 + the two committed stage-3 patches (shas in model_revisions): global per-token mask table; DROP = stage-3 route-around mode-2 semantics, SWAP = module-swap mode-3 semantics VERBATIM from poc/glm52-probe/stage3/abl.h (18/18 unit checks + real-model inertness proof carried); FAIL-CLOSED load (whole-file sha256 re-verified at engine start, refuse on mismatch/malformed line, NEVER silent unmasked fall-through); inert when unset - bring-up gate: empty-table run byte-identical to the stage-3 build on a seeded 8-item spot set. Mask serialization: ASCII/LF, '#' header lines (schema kot-s4mask/1, arm, params, input sha256s), one 'main|L|E DROP' or 'main|L|E SWAP <dst>' line per cell sorted by (L,E), layers 3..78 INCLUSIVE (76 MoE layers, ASM-2342 MEASURED correction consumed; review finding C1 fixed), experts 0..255 only. Mask builder poc/glm52-probe/stage4/build_masks.py sha256 48650ff3e3009706e520f58338da4cecdaa326f60ce57fdab74593a632913d83 (selftest 25/25 green 2026-07-16 post-cross-model-review + skeptic-5: zero-cost cells barred from every fill; blind fills target a +-1% window inside the 2% gate; ZERO achievable dose emits a REGISTERED construction-kill manifest, never a crash; identical blind/semd cell sets refused fail-closed ERR_S4_MASK_IDENTICAL; 76-layer universe 19,456 cells + layer-78 eligibility asserted; full-scale mock on real stage-3+atlas inputs with SYNTHETIC 76-layer telemetry: s4-semd 426 cells at 9.81% dose, all blind arms matched <= 1.0%). Suite generator poc/glm52-probe/stage4/gen_suite.py sha256 8c624a1f5436e10862ae5dc04ec2696b789e0fc44c8ce2c2ecab95f05917f0b3 (disjointness is a generation-refusal + bring-up re-verification; the id->family mapping is PINNED in the analysis, ASM-2398). Instrument settings: DRAFT=0 greedy, TOPK=8 config default, EXPERT_BUDGET off, CACHE_ROUTE off, pinned cache config (RAM_GB=55, stage-3 GO-FULL-GLM52 backend), identical across arms - ONLY S4_TABLE differs; arm-order block randomization seed 20260802. T-eval throughput runs TWICE per arm (seeded interleaved blocks, pass_idx in rows) FOLLOWED by the COMMON-TOKEN REPLAY: every throughput arm teacher-forces the SAME pinned s4-b0 pass-1 reference trajectories (sha256 pinned in-run BEFORE any replay; ASM-2398) and the replay counters are the ONLY realized-dose currency (matching gate 5% of the dose; PASS floor 8%), and commonality is MECHANICAL (ASM-2401): every replay row carries traj_sha256 over the exact forced token-id sequence, gated on identity against the pinned per-prompt reference digests (meta.replay_reference.digests) - equal token counts over divergent sequences VOID io_match; projected matching is RECOMPUTED from the masks audit's removed_frac/removed_bytes_per_tok with the supplied match_rel_err cross-checked at <= 0.005. Analysis invocation: verdict-gen pipes the runner's kot-s4row/3 rows (v2->v3, re-review R3: replay rows gain MANDATORY traj_sha256, item rows gain MANDATORY validated n_target_toks, meta gains replay_reference.digests) (a D10 role:'rows' artifact on the chained log) to analysis/glm_s4drop_stdin.py on STDIN with NO argv; the analysis also accepts a phase='construction' meta-only stream at the pre-spend point (kill-2 / dose-band stop from telemetry+masks alone, ASM-2400). Mock self-test green 2026-07-16 (post-re-review R3 revision): 86/86 (ten decision branches - PASS, KILL-ub, KILL-dose-at-construction, DOSE-BAND-STOP, VOID-gate, INCONCLUSIVE, lb<=0-NOT-KILL, TOST, TIE-AT-SUB-FLOOR-DOSE->INCONCLUSIVE, TOST-AT-SUB-FLOOR-DOSE->INCONCLUSIVE-not-kill; all 68 output fields on every branch; byte-deterministic recompute; 23 fail-closed rejections incl. ERR_S4A_DOSE_INCOHERENT in both phases, final-phase ERR_S4A_DOSE_BAND, realized-vs-projected coherence refusals, n_target_toks and traj_sha256 requirements; adversarial replays gated: inert/rounded NLLs, NEAR-ZERO-VARIANCE jitter (liveness floor, INSTRUMENT-INVALID not KILL), secondary-drop primary-invariance, collapsed families, 24.9% realized mismatch, EQUAL-LENGTH DIVERGENT-TRAJECTORY digests, CONTRADICTORY projected-match audits (both directions), placeholder pins, ledger shapes incl. duplicate-placeholder/out-of-order/skipped-boundary checkpoint trails, off-corpus prompt ids, off-schedule token budgets; decode/replay rows bind to the pinned T-eval ids s4d-e00..e07 with ONE common token budget in {96, 64}; random blinds refused on identity with semd, bldf, or each other; ledger scale floors carry the registered planning-scale figures USD 16.2 / 14.1 h per the F1-K round-6 lesson). TELEMETRY COUNTER SEMANTICS PINNED PRE-FREEZE (ASM-2395): expert cache-miss bytes = routed-expert weight-tensor bytes read from the estate into the ENGINE's expert cache because a selected expert was not resident at a token position; DRAFT=0 so MTP loads excluded; OS page cache invisible; attribution to the selected cell; the S4_TABLE patch must ship a unit-test vector (synthetic trace, known per-cell counter values) and the ops amendment may not reinterpret this definition.

model_revisions.glm52-weights: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:content hash of the mateogrgic GLM-5.2 int4 estate on the relaunched instance, pinned at bring-up before any scored token
model_revisions.reference-trajectories: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:sha256 of the s4-b0 pass-1 greedy T-eval continuations (the common-token replay trajectories), pinned in-run BEFORE any replay pass (ASM-2398; echoed in meta.pins.reference_trajectories)
model_revisions.runner-script: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:sha256 of the runner's reproducible run-script staged bytes (ops amendment BEFORE any spend; ASM-2398; echoed in meta.pins.runner_script and checked by pins_present_valid)
model_revisions.s4-table-patch: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:unified-diff sha256 of the S4_TABLE decode-mask + telemetry-counter patch (ASM-2394; the ONLY owed code artifact; ops amendment before any spend)
model_revisions.staged-bytes-manifest: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:sha256 of the staged-bytes manifest covering every file the campaign executes with (ops amendment BEFORE any spend; ASM-2398; echoed in meta.pins.staged_bytes_manifest)

anchors: SS1 (question, ESTIMAND option (b) decision, falsifiable hypotheses, pre-named null)
SS2 (pinned inputs: three materialized corpora + telemetry/masks/patch/weights/runner-bytes/reference-trajectories PINNED-AT-INPUTS)
SS3 (arms, tiered composite mask, dose + matching constants incl. common-token replay, blind constructions, evidence-asymmetry-in-the-claim)
SS4 (telemetry prerequisite, tier M/P cost-model discipline)
SS5 (instrument, ONE primary contrast, revised decision rule, bootstrap/TOST, cluster + full-verdict power)
SS6 (instrument gates, all fail to INSTRUMENT-INVALID; SS6.1 construction phase)
SS8 (cost, LIVE ledger, caps, analysis-compatible degradation ladder, sequencing)
SS9-SS12 (review record: green mocks + skeptic-4 attack + cross-model HOLD -> R2 dispositions + skeptic-5 R2 re-attack)
SS13 (stage-4 cross-model re-review of R2: residual HOLD items 2/3/5 + R3 dispositions, kot-s4row/3)

title: GLM-5.2 Stage-4 expert-drop efficiency (glm-s4drop-0, R2 post-cross-model-review): is the Stage-4 COMPOSITE expert-drop mask a REAL throughput lever? At a removed-I/O dose targeted at 10% of measured decode expert cache-miss bytes/token (telemetry-cost-weighted, GPT-5.6 review requirement 1-2), does the composite mask (s4-semd: 16-cell stage-3 skiplist + 6 SAFE-below-conf cells + UNVALIDATED atlas rare/unseen cost-weighted extension) preserve more quality than the deployable concept-free blind mask matched on ACTUAL removed I/O via COMMON-TOKEN replay (s4-bldf-d: ascending-selection-frequency EXPERT_BUDGET analog), on a 300-item quality suite strictly disjoint from the 244 stage-3 selection items and all 480 wave-A probes, while decoding faster than baseline on the held-out T-eval split? ESTIMAND (ASM-2397, review option (b)): the contrast is composite-pipeline-vs-deployable-frequency-heuristic and does NOT isolate causal evidence per se (the composite consumes ~2 orders of magnitude more routing evidence; the atlas extension supplies almost all of the dose) - no outcome licenses 'causal evidence beats frequency ranking'. Plus the ASM-2383 joint-safety cohort (all 16 skiplist cells dropped SIMULTANEOUSLY vs s4-b0) and a separate never-confounded CACHE_ROUTE-analog remap arm (s4-remap16). Design: docs/next/design/glm52-stage4-drop-efficiency.md (bead kernel-of-truth-1xqd.2; R2 fix wave bead kernel-of-truth-84gg). ASMs: ASM-2384..2396 (designer-15) + ASM-2397..2400 (designer-18, cross-model-review fixes) - all centrally registered; ASM-2383 (stage-3 scope guard) consumed; ASM-2342 (76 MoE layers 3..78, MEASURED) consumed by the mask universe. Quality endpoints feed nothing until verdict-gen's registered pathway runs; tok/s and miss-bytes/token on T-eval are the only systems endpoints.
